did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article ('State-Of-The-Art in Skin Cancer Detection: A Review') that surveys existing AI, machine learning, and deep learning techniques (such as CNNs, GANs, ANN, SVM) used in dermatology. It does not present original experimental results obtained by the authors using AI; rather, it summarizes and compares methods and metrics reported in other studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
